revision.comment: Adding "| position = {{{position|}}}" per editprotected request on talk page. And adding missing "{{pp-template|small=yes}}".
Removing leading ":" in front of "Category", since shouldn't be there any more. And adding whitespace stripping of parameter 1.
Implement sand-boxed version per talk page. (automation assisted)

revision.text:
{{Commons | position = {{{position|}}} <!-- {{#if:x|}} strips whitespace from parameter 1, in case it is fed like this: {{Commons category| Some cat }}. --> |Category:{{#if:x| {{{1| {{PAGENAME}} }}} }}<!-- -->|{{{2|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}<!-- -->}}<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}||[[Category:Commons category template with no category set]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding Wikidata corruption tracking so we can find out if we're ready for the Wikidata switchover.
encoding the pagename to avoid errors, per request of [[User:Vriullop]]
Changed protection level of Template:Commons category ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/Pigsonthewing|Pigsonthewing]] ([[User talk:Pigsonthewing|talk]]) to last version by Fuhghettaboutit

Undid revision 668109465 by [[Special:Contributions/Pigsonthewing|Pigsonthewing]] ([[User talk:Pigsonthewing|talk]]) - that does not work - now putting all pages in the different category - got 500 incorrect so far
Removing actively unhelpful category: there's no need to track pages that just use this template, since it's almost always done intentionally

Undid revision 681550535 by [[Special:Contributions/Nyttend|Nyttend]] ([[User talk:Nyttend|talk]]) don't pre-empt the outcome of [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2015 August 20#Category:Commons category template with no category set]]
use category defined on wikidata if no parameter is given
For diagnostic cat: sort by name-space.
Category deleted per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2017 January 25]]
another category deleted per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2017 January 25]]
lose the newlines, these are causing extra blank space in articles
don't add userpages into Category:Commons category template with no category set)
escaping the string isn't needed. tested with Q739550 (M&M's) and Q8349 ("Weird Al" Yankovic)
Handle underscores (which was asked for in the original edit request that resulted in the page name encoding, but never implemented)
New version from sandbox: using commons sitelinks, redoing tracking categories, and other changes - see [[Template_talk:Commons_category#Please_test_a_new_version_of_this_template]] for discussion.
revision.text:
{{Commons | position = {{{position|}}} <!-- Link --> | 1 = <!-- Check for a locally-specified category -->{{#if:{{{1|}}} | Category:{{{1|}}} <!-- ... or use Wikidata -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}<!-- ... or fall back to the page name --> |Category:{{PAGENAME}} }} }} <!-- Display title --> | 2 = {{{2|{{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{{1|}}} <!-- -->|{{if then show|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|Category:|}}<!-- --> |{{PAGENAME}} }} }} }}} }}<!-- End of the template code, now add relevant tracking categories
--><includeonly>{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}||{{ns:14}}=<!-- Only add tracking categories to articles and categories. -->{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#ifeq:Category:{{{1|}}}|{{#invoke:WikidataIB |getCommonsLink|qid={{{qid|}}}|onlycat=True}}|<!-- -->[[Category:Commons category link is on Wikidata]]<!--
-->|{{#ifeq:{{{1|}}}|{{PAGENAME}}|<!-- ... the local parameter is the same as the local pagename, but not the same as on Wikidata -->[[Category:Commons category link is defined as the pagename]]<!--
... the local parameter does not match either of these -->|[[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]]}} }}<!--
